diagrams.title: alarm() Function Behavior
diagrams.description: Timeline showing how alarm() schedules SIGALRM at specified seconds
elements: Shows cancellation: alarm(3) at t=2 resets to t=5
diagrams.purpose: Understand alarm scheduling and cancellation behavior

diagrams.title: setitimer() Structure
diagrams.description: Structure of itimerval showing it_value and it_interval fields
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how interval timers are configured and auto-reload

diagrams.title: Race Condition in Timeout
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing race window between condition check and blocking call
diagrams.purpose: Understand why race conditions occur and how to prevent them

visuals.title: Alarm And Pause Functions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for alarm and pause functions
